items.headline: WSJ Apr 28 OpenAI revenue-miss report broke the AI-trade tape
items.diff_narrative: **New: WSJ Apr 28 OpenAI revenue-miss report broke the AI-trade tape — Oracle -4%, AMD -3%, Broadcom -4%, SoftBank -10%; S&P -0.49%, Nasdaq -0.9%; OpenAI rebutted "ridiculous"** — Yesterday's report covered the Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind (a structural enabler) but had no comparable revenue-side counterweight. Apr 28's WSJ scoop is **the first material crack in the AI-capex-on-faith tape**: ChatGPT growth slowed Q4 + missed an internal 1B-WAU goal; Friar reportedly told colleagues compute-funding may tighten without re-acceleration. The fall hit chip + foundation-lab-coupled names hardest and **lands the hour before today's MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN/META prints + Powell's final FOMC presser**. The Apr 28 stock close: **S&P 500 7,138.80 (-0.49%), Nasdaq 24,663.80 (-0.9%), Dow 49,141.90, Russell 2000 2,755.99 (-1.15%)** — a clean reversal of Apr 27's record close (S&P 7,173.91).

items.headline: Apr 28 CVE quad
items.diff_narrative: **New: Apr 28 CVE quad — Milesight AIOT default-SSL-key (CVE-2026-32644, CVSS 9.8) + Totolink A8000RU 7240/7242/7243 — extends Apr 27-28 wave to 7+ distinct 9.8 CVEs in 72h; CISA KEV Apr 28 adds ConnectWise ScreenConnect CVE-2024-1708 + Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202** — Yesterday's report covered the Apr 27 Totolink trio (7153/7154/7156) + the lone Apr 28 7202. Apr 28 publishes **three more A8000RU 9.8s** (7240/7242/7243) plus **Milesight cameras shipping with default SSL private keys** (CVE-2026-32644, 9.8). CISA's same-day KEV add: **ConnectWise ScreenConnect CVE-2024-1708** (path traversal, chained with CVE-2024-1709 auth bypass for 14+ months) + **Windows Shell CVE-2026-32202** (APT28 spoofing exploit since Dec-2025). May-12 federal deadline. **SGLang CVE-2026-5760** still unpatched into Apr 29 (10+ days post-disclosure).

items.headline: KV-cache-compression utility wave crystallizes
items.diff_narrative: **New: KV-cache-compression utility wave crystallizes — TurboQuant 6x compression / 8x faster attention at ICLR 2026 (Apr 23-25); SGLang PR #21419 in-tree + #23134 fused-kernel rewrite (93-105% bf16); NVIDIA kvpress at Decoding-Press; PolyKV arxiv 2604.24971 (Apr 27); KVTC + PackKV + TriAttention community implementations** — Yesterday's report did not cover KV-cache-compression as a standing topic. **TurboQuant** (Google Research) hits Q2 2026 official Python release; **community ports already shipping** in MLX, Triton, vLLM, SGLang. **PolyKV** (Apr 27 arxiv): shared asymmetric KV-pool, int8 keys + 3-bit TurboQuant-MSE values via HF DynamicCache. **NVIDIA kvpress** + **KVTC (20x compression)** + **PackKV (15.30x V)** + **TriAttention (10.7x)** complete the inference-runtime stack. Belongs alongside Bonsai-8B and Unsloth as a standing on-device-stack baseline.

items.headline: Corpus2Skill (arxiv 2604.14572, Apr 27)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Corpus2Skill (arxiv 2604.14572, Apr 27) — hierarchical-skill-tree RAG that beats dense retrieval / RAPTOR / agentic RAG on WixQA without a vector DB; arxiv 2604.08224 (Apr 24) "Externalization in LLM Agents" survey frames skills/harness/protocol as the 2026 design pattern** — Yesterday's report did not cover Corpus2Skill or the Externalization survey. **Corpus2Skill** distills a corpus offline into a navigable skill directory; agent drills via progressively finer summaries, retrieves docs by ID; highest quality on every WixQA metric. **Externalization** survey is the canonical 2026 framing for the move from weights → prompts → skills/harness/protocol — the same arc driving Anthropic's 17-skill repo, ClawHub, Multica, AgentCore Managed Harness.

items.headline: Novita Sandbox launched Apr 28
items.diff_narrative: **New: Novita Sandbox launched Apr 28 — managed NovitaClaw deployments + Sandbox Skills for OpenClaw + Hermes-compatible runtimes + persistent-node configs; first commercial mitigation product purpose-built for OpenClaw + Hermes + autonomous-agent runtimes** — Yesterday's report covered Okta-for-AI-Agents GA Apr 30 + Microsoft Zero Trust for AI carry-forward. **Novita Sandbox** is the first agent-runtime-specific sandbox layer aimed at the ClawHavoc + Cisco-prompt-injection threat-class. Counterpart to AgentCore microVM isolation but skill-marketplace-aware.

items.headline: Multica v0.2.18 (Apr 27)
items.diff_narrative: **New: Multica v0.2.18 (Apr 27) — superseding v0.2.16 (Apr 24); v0.2.18 ships in the same 3-day window as the Novita Sandbox launch and the Apr 27 OpenAI/Microsoft AGI-clause unwind** — Yesterday's report had v0.2.16 (Chat V2 + right-click context menus + Autopilot redesign). v0.2.18 (Apr 27) is the next minor on the same orchestrator-skills surface; pairs naturally with the Novita Sandbox launch as the open-source, vendor-neutral counterpart.

items.headline: AI Dev 26 SF day-1 underway Apr 28 + day-2 Apr 29
items.diff_narrative: **New: AI Dev 26 SF day-1 underway Apr 28 + day-2 Apr 29 — full speaker lineup (Google DeepMind, Oracle, AMD, Arm, Neo4j, LangChain, LandingAI, Replit, AI21) + tracks on Agentic AI, Context Engineering, Multimodal AI Apps, AI Governance, Coding-with-AI** — Yesterday's report listed AI Dev 26 SF as opening today. Today the conference is in-progress at Pier 48 Mission Bay; the speaker list is now the consequential update — **Andrew Ng + Google DeepMind + Oracle + AMD + Arm + Neo4j + LangChain + LandingAI + Replit + AI21** all on stage. Hands-on workshops on agentic AI, context engineering, RAG, model evaluation, and AI safety in production.

items.headline: ClawHavoc quantified at 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's 36% prompt-injection finding across OpenClaw marketplace
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: ClawHavoc quantified at 1,184 malicious ClawHub skills + Cisco's 36% prompt-injection finding across OpenClaw marketplace** — Practitioner detail tightens: **Antiy Labs + Koi Security analyses** + Kurtz RSAC keynote on self-erasing-after-install memory. The narrative supporting the Apr 28 Novita Sandbox launch and the standing zero-trust-for-agentic-AI thesis.

items.headline: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 still unpatched into Apr 29
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: SGLang CVE-2026-5760 still unpatched into Apr 29** — Maintainer-coordination has yielded no upstream fix; v0.5.10 ships exploitable. Cross-server copy-paste class to vLLM CVE-2025-61620 + LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626. The AI-Infra-KEV thesis from yesterday's "Future" tightens.

items.headline: DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash (Apr 24) traction Apr 27-29
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: DeepSeek V4 Pro / V4 Flash (Apr 24) traction Apr 27-29** — Hugging Face V4-Pro page live; 1.6T MoE / 49B active (Pro), 284B / 13B active (Flash); 1M context; first DeepSeek release optimized for Huawei Ascend chips. Hybrid Attention reduces compute to 27% (Pro) / 10% (Flash) of V3.2 in 1M-context. Bloomberg Apr 27 "Why China's DeepSeek, Qwen and Moonshot Are a Worry for US AI Rivals" frames the Western/Chinese open-weight gap as months-to-days.

items.headline: Mag 7 super-week + FOMC Apr 29 (Powell's last)
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: Mag 7 super-week + FOMC Apr 29 (Powell's last) — MSFT/GOOGL/AMZN/META print after close today; AAPL Apr 30; ~$700B 2026 aggregated capex; rates held 3.50-3.75% (consensus 100%)** — All four Wednesday names + Apple Apr 30. Microsoft FY26 Q3 consensus EPS $4.07 / rev $81.4B (guide $80.65-$81.75B; Azure +37-38% cc); Alphabet Q1 EPS $2.63 / rev $106.89B (FY26 capex $175-$185B); Meta EPS $7.51 / rev $55.5B; Amazon EPS $2.11 / rev $177.2B. Powell's term ends May 15.

items.headline: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 + OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta cadence into Apr 29
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: Hermes Agent v0.11.0 + OpenClaw v2026.4.25-beta cadence into Apr 29** — Carry-forward; Novita Sandbox launches in the same window with first-class Hermes-compatible runtimes + Sandbox Skills for OpenClaw, ratifying both as production-runtime baselines.

items.headline: Anthropic Opus 4.7 + Claude Managed Agents + Claude Cowork in Bedrock + AgentCore Managed Harness 4-region preview
items.diff_narrative: **Continuing: Anthropic Opus 4.7 + Claude Managed Agents + Claude Cowork in Bedrock + AgentCore Managed Harness 4-region preview** — Carry-forward into AI Dev 26 SF day-2. The skills/harness/protocol stack is the dominant frame at the conference.
